description: Quite incredible with a group of 4 not found in the State before. People were camping around the lake in their vehicles, dogs were running around with generators running. We birded inbetween the campers & when we came to the west corner, we couldn't believe our eyes. We both said "Ruddy Turnstones" simultaneousl! All 4 were in breeding plumage. The Killdeer kept chasing 1 in particular.
